title: ocotea oblonga subsp. cuprea
intro: Ocotea oblonga subsp. cuprea is a plant species also known as Cuprea, a type of evergreen tree native to Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the essential oil extracted from its leaves, which is rich in alpha-pinene, limonene, and beta-pinene compounds. The health benefits of Ocotea oblonga subsp. cuprea include its potential to alleviate anxiety, improve sleep quality, and have anti-inflammatory properties, which may help with pain relief and immune system support. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, where it is often blended with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
